channel.title: Michael Epps Blog
channel.description: Personal blog by Michael Epps covering web development and software engineering

item.title: Building Interactive Components
item.description: Learn how to add interactive components to your Astro blog using islands architecture

item.title: Getting Started with Astro
item.description: An introduction to building fast, content-focused websites with Astro

item.title: Draft: Future Post Ideas
item.description: A draft article for testing draft filtering functionality

item.title: Typography and Content Showcase
item.description: A comprehensive example showcasing various typography elements, code blocks, lists, and formatting options
